title: Source for Original Central Anime Fansub
display_title: Source for Original Central Anime Fansub
wikitext: []: Source for Original Central Anime Fansub             Quote Post by gibbdude » Tue Jun 08, 2021 11:33 pm Hello everyone, I'm currently putting together a version of Evangelion for my own viewing (and maybe a release ) that will be my personal ideal way to experience Eva. I don't know how controversial it is to say this, but from the releases I could find and my low-intermediate level of Japanese, I've decided that I like the Central Anime fansub the best. The issue is that the only source I could find for it was in Sephirotic's release, which uses some later, edited versions of the subs which were altered for the episodes made markedly different by the Renewal edits (i.e. 21-24, which became 21'-24'). Since I prefer and am using the On-Air edit, these subs won't work, and furthermore, I'd like to have the originals for the sake preservation. Does anyone have those, or know where I should look to find them? Sorry if this is the wrong place to be making inquiries, as you can see, I'm new here.

Article: Source for Original Central Anime Fansub
[]: Source for Original Central Anime Fansub             Quote Post by gibbdude » Tue Jun 08, 2021 11:33 pm Hello everyone, I'm currently putting together a version of Evangelion for my own viewing (and maybe a release ) that will be my personal ideal way to experience Eva. I don't know how controversial it is to say this, but from the releases I could find and my low-intermediate level of Japanese, I've decided that I like the Central Anime fansub the best. The issue is that the only source I could find for it was in Sephirotic's release, which uses some later, edited versions of the subs which were altered for the episodes made markedly different by the Renewal edits (i.e. 21-24, which became 21'-24'). Since I prefer and am using the On-Air edit, these subs won't work, and furthermore, I'd like to have the originals for the sake preservation. Does anyone have those, or know where I should look to find them? Sorry if this is the wrong place to be making inquiries, as you can see, I'm new here.
